//
// Generated by JSON2Apex http://json2apex.herokuapp.com/
//
// The supplied json has fields with names that are not valid in apex
// and so can only be parsed with explicitly generated code, this option
// was auto selected for you.

public class CityApexConversion {

    public String state {get;set;} 
    public String region {get;set;} 
    public String DGR {get;set;} 
    public List<String> list_Z {get;set;} // in json: list

    public CityApexConversion(JSONParser parser) {
        while (parser.nextToken() != System.JSONToken.END_OBJECT) {
            if (parser.getCurrentToken() == System.JSONToken.FIELD_NAME) {
                String text = parser.getText();
                if (parser.nextToken() != System.JSONToken.VALUE_NULL) {
                    if (text == 'state') {
                        state = parser.getText();
                    } else if (text == 'region') {
                        region = parser.getText();
                    } else if (text == 'DGR') {
                        DGR = parser.getText();
                    } else if (text == 'list') {
                        list_Z = arrayOfString(parser);
                    } else {
                        System.debug(LoggingLevel.WARN, 'CityApexConversion consuming unrecognized property: '+text);
                        consumeObject(parser);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    
    public static List<CityApexConversion> parse(String json) {
        System.JSONParser parser = System.JSON.createParser(json);
        return arrayOfCityApexConversion(parser);
    }
    
    public static void consumeObject(System.JSONParser parser) {
        Integer depth = 0;
        do {
            System.JSONToken curr = parser.getCurrentToken();
            if (curr == System.JSONToken.START_OBJECT || 
                curr == System.JSONToken.START_ARRAY) {
                depth++;
            } else if (curr == System.JSONToken.END_OBJECT ||
                curr == System.JSONToken.END_ARRAY) {
                depth--;
            }
        } while (depth > 0 && parser.nextToken() != null);
    }
    

    private static List<CityApexConversion> arrayOfCityApexConversion(System.JSONParser p) {
        List<CityApexConversion> res = new List<CityApexConversion>();
        if (p.getCurrentToken() == null) p.nextToken();
        while (p.nextToken() != System.JSONToken.END_ARRAY) {
            res.add(new CityApexConversion(p));
        }
        return res;
    }





    private static List<String> arrayOfString(System.JSONParser p) {
        List<String> res = new List<String>();
        if (p.getCurrentToken() == null) p.nextToken();
        while (p.nextToken() != System.JSONToken.END_ARRAY) {
            res.add(p.getText());
        }
        return res;
    }


}
